title: CRH Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
content:

content:
NEW YORK – Apr. 30, 2026 – CRH (NYSE: CRH), the leading provider of building materials, is pleased to announce that it has completed the latest phase of its share buyback program, returning a further $0.3 billion of cash to shareholders. This brings total cash returned to shareholders under our ongoing share buyback program to […]
